intro: Petrorhagia arabica, also known as Arab's rose or Red rose, is a perennial plant belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities that may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce oxidative stress, and combat infections. The bioactive constituents of Petrorhagia arabica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities.
